title: Musicality
description: Do you want a more decorated stage or music setting in minecraft? Use this mod to add microphones, Music Stands, and more!
body:
Welcome to Musicality, The Mod for decorating Musical enviroments. Do you have a stage or bandroom you can use Musicality to decorate that room.
Showcase video:<iframe width="560" height="350" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/DqJ9uU4W8hs" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>
## Summary
Musicality adds a Music Stand, Jazz Front, Digital Keyboard, Child's Drum Kit. I also am adding custom Jazz Fronts regularly. 
Use this form to get a custom Jazz Front:[https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSd36U3x4RsEHXNsu56Hq4DcozDtPmd6pqWyz8Cr134vQ0Nl-A/viewform](https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSd36U3x4RsEHXNsu56Hq4DcozDtPmd6pqWyz8Cr134vQ0Nl-A/viewform)

### Items
- Music Stand
- Jazz Front
- TJI Jazz Front
- 4-Piece Mini Drum Kit
- Digital Keyboard
- Boom Stand Microphone
  
### Sources
The Music Stand is based on a Manhasset Music Stand and the Drum Kits are based on Yamaha Stage Customs

# Plans for the Future
- Custom Jazz Fronts
- Enlarging Drum kit to a full size one
- 5-Peice Drum Kit
- Grand Steinway Piano
- Conductor's Music Stand
- Subtle Digital Keyboard
- Alternative Color Drum Kits
- Modular Drum Kits
- Microphone (Straight Stand)
- Instrument Stands
- Player Model Modifications with Instruments
- Marching Band Uniforms
- Mallet Percussion (Vibraphone, Marimba, etc)
- Gong
- Bass Drum
- Marching Instruments
- Hand-held Instruments
- Functional Instruments

# DISCLAIMER
This mod is developed for **Minecraft 1.14** and is ported to other versions. The reason I'm developing this mod for Minecraft 1.14 is to ensure compatibility for CubedPack, A texture pack only being developed for 1.14. This mod is primarily made for my minecraft worlds. The MOST STABLE VERSION is the 1.14 version, all o thers are to be used with caution
